description: Current passenger-car fleet by fuel type with avg age per fuel. Use when user asks current EV/petrol/diesel counts or share. For year-by-year trend use dmr-car-ev-adoption-trend.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _drivkraft_primaer IS NOT NULL | EVAL first_registration_year_clean = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar >= 1900 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= DATE_EXTRACT("year", NOW()), _foerste_registrering_aar, null) | STATS vehicle_count = COUNT(*), avg_first_registration_year = AVG(first_registration_year_clean), avg_co2_g_per_km = AVG(_co2_g_per_km_primaer), avg_km_per_liter = AVG(_km_per_liter_primaer) BY fuel = _drivkraft_primaer | SORT vehicle_count DESC | LIMIT 10
